questions.q: In what year was the movie 'Tremors 2: Aftershocks' released?
questions.correctText: Tremors 2: Aftershocks was released on April 9, 1996.

questions.q: Which director developed 'Interstellar' for a year before Christopher Nolan took over?
questions.correctText: Steven Spielberg was involved with 'Interstellar' for a year before Christopher Nolan took over as director.

questions.q: What is the title of Brad Bird's upcoming animated neo-noir sci-fi film starring Sam Rockwell and Scarlett Johansson?
questions.correctText: Brad Bird's upcoming animated neo-noir sci-fi film is titled 'Ray Gunn.'

questions.q: In which year was the comedy film 'Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby' released?
questions.correctText: 'Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby' was released in 2006.

questions.q: What is the release date for the horror film 'The Yeti' in the United States?
questions.correctText: The film 'The Yeti' was released in the United States on April 10, 2026.
